pageHeader.title: What I Offer
pageHeader.intro:
Our wellness salon offers more than hair styling — we are focused on bringing wholeness to our clients through self-reflection. Our salon offers an environment for clients to enjoy, relax, and be present. We cultivate a safe space for self-care, self-expression, and positive change. I believe the beauty and wellness experience should leave you with more than a service you love — it should leave you feeling uplifted, confident, and reconnected to the best version of yourself.

With over a decade of experience as a Texas certified cosmetologist, I bring a thoughtful balance of technical precision and intuitive artistry to every appointment. As a practicing tarot consultant and astrological chart interpreter, I offer one-on-one guidance and care in my home studio. Here at Pink Moon we offer a diverse range of self-care through creating looks, intuitive guidance, and sensory touch services.

services.name: Natural Balayage
services.description: Soft, sun-kissed dimension hand-painted for a natural, lived-in finish that grows out beautifully.

services.name: Vivid Balayage
services.description: Bold, expressive color — from pastels to saturated vivids — blended seamlessly into your natural base.

services.name: Lightning Services
services.description: Full bleach, highlights, or targeted lightening services to achieve your desired lift safely and precisely.

services.name: Toning Refresh
services.description: Gloss and tone service to revive shine, neutralize brassiness, and extend the life of your color.

services.name: Women's Cut
services.description: Volume, polish, and lasting shape — your hair perfected around your face shape, texture, and lifestyle.

services.name: Men's Cut
services.description: Precision cuts tailored to your face shape, lifestyle, and energy.

services.name: Kids Cut
services.description: Gentle, age-appropriate cuts in a calm, welcoming studio environment.

services.name: Bang Trim
services.description: Quick fringe maintenance between full appointments. First-time clients receive a complimentary moon phase analysis.

services.name: Maintain Layers
services.description: Keep your shape fresh and your movement alive between full cut appointments. First-time clients receive a complimentary moon phase analysis.

services.name: Ends-Only Clean Up
services.description: Remove split ends and restore softness without altering length or shape. First-time clients receive a complimentary moon phase analysis.

services.name: Luxury Shampoo & Scalp Tingles
services.description: Relaxing shampoo with scalp scratching and tracing.

services.name: Blowout + Scalp Scratch Session
services.description: Professional blowout followed by calming scalp tingles.

services.name: Scalp Detox & Tingle Ritual
services.description: Clarifying scalp cleanse with sensory scalp stimulation.

services.name: Hair Brushing ASMR Session
services.description: Slow brushing, tracing, and gentle hair play.

services.name: Deep Conditioning + Relaxation Scalp Service
services.description: Conditioning treatment with scalp scratching and aromatherapy.

services.name: Color Processing Relaxation Add-On
services.description: Arm scratching, scalp tracing, or shoulder tingles during color processing time.

services.name: Aromatherapy
services.description: Calming essential oil blends to deepen your relaxation experience.

services.name: Warm Towel Ritual
services.description: Soothing warm towel treatment to relax the scalp and neck.

services.name: Extended Arm Scratching
services.description: Additional time dedicated to arm tracing and sensory relaxation.

services.name: Scalp Oil Treatment
services.description: Nourishing oil applied to the scalp during your sensory session.

services.name: Session Rates
services.description: Book any duration as a standalone appointment or add on to your hair service.

services.name: Relationship Compatibility Reading
services.description: Discover how your chart aligns with a romantic partner or love interest. Explores crush compatibility, communication dynamics, and emotional compatibility to reveal what draws you together — and where you may need to grow.

services.name: Friendship / Family Compatibility Reading
services.description: Uncover the astrological patterns behind your closest bonds — from mother/daughter dynamics and sibling compatibility to friendship patterns and coworker communication. Understand why some connections feel effortless and others create friction.

services.name: "Ask One Question" Astrology Reading
services.description: Bring your most pressing question and receive a focused chart reading built around it. Great for clarity on things like: why you struggle in relationships, what career energy stands out in your chart, or why people tend to misunderstand you.

services.name: "Big 3" Mini Reading
services.description: A snapshot of your Sun, Moon, and Rising signs — your personality overview, emotional style, and outward image. Includes your key strengths, challenges, and basic relationship tendencies.

consultationCta.headline: Not sure what to book?
consultationCta.supportingText: Start with a free consultation and get recommendations based on your hair goals, maintenance routine, and timeline.
